title: My second great African trip organized by Gondwana Tours & Safaris
text:
For this trip to Kenya, the plan was to combine a traditional African safari with some off-the-beaten-track experience. For this, I contacted Christelle from Gondwana Tours again — she had prepared a great and perfectly organized trip to Botswana and Zimbabwe for us two years ago.

This time I wanted to combine a safari in the Masai Mara with a trip to Kakamega Forest, where I planned to focus on hiking and searching/photographing reptiles and insects. The preliminary discussions with Christelle were very useful. With her knowledge and experience, she helped me better understand the available options and what was realistically possible within the budget.

Based on her advice, I chose the North Conservancy in the Mara, which is much less crowded than the main national park and offers additional activities such as off-road driving, night safaris, and walking safaris. For the Kakamega part of the trip, Christelle found excellent guides whose expertise was perfectly aligned with my special interest — herping. She was always very responsive, positive, and open to discussing different options, and I truly enjoyed planning this trip with her.

The trip itself was great, and everything was arranged as planned. The only logistical issue was a delayed Safarilink flight from Kisumu, which caused me to miss my connection to the Mara. However, the situation was closely followed by Gondwana Tours and their partner in Kenya, Cheli & Peacock. They kept me informed of developments, rebooked the flight, and assisted me at the airport to ensure the transfer was smooth and without hassle.

The safari fully met my high expectations. Among the highlights, I would mention the night safari when we followed a pride of lions and observed their activity after dark — a remarkable experience. Equally memorable was the slow exploration of the humid African forest in Kakamega on foot, observing colobus monkeys and searching/photographing for snakes, chameleons, and insects.

Many thanks to Gondwana Tours & Safaris for organizing this trip — I hope to be back in Africa soon.

title: Amazing Gorilla Trek Experience organized by Gondwana Tours & Safaris
text: Gondwana Tours & Safaris organized our gorilla trek in Rwanda (executed by Great Lakes Safaris) and made it absolutely amazing. Everything was perfectly organized, and the experience exceeded our expectations. A special thanks to Christelle, our excellent travel consultant—knowledgeable, friendly, and passionate about Southern Africa. Seeing the gorillas up close was unforgettable, and we highly recommend consulting Gondwana Tours a Safaris to anyone planning a gorilla trek in Rwanda.

On behalf of Christelle and the whole Gondwana Team, many thanks for travelling with us and the time to review us. Thanks for sharing our passion for Africas wildlife with us and for entrusting us with your travel plans. We love to hear from you again. 
Kind regards, Gondwana Tours & Safaris team

title: Un viaje inolvidable en familia por Botswana y Zimbabwe
text:
Somos una familia de tres personas (padre y dos hijas) que acabamos de regresar de un viaje inolvidable por Botswana. Simplemente espectacular! Todavía estamos con una resaca emocional y nuestra cabeza sigue allí 💔 
La verdad es que no sabíamos muy bien por dónde empezar a organizar el viaje y, después de leer varias opiniones, contactamos con Gondwana Tours & Safaris. Fue una de las mejores decisiones del viaje. Gracias a las excelentes opiniones que leímos en plataformas y foros, decidimos contactar con Gondwana, y fue todo un acierto. Muy recomendable! 

Steffi nos organizó un tour totalmente personalizado de 10 días, adaptado a nuestros gustos y necesidades. Desde el primer momento estuvo muy pendiente de que todo saliera perfecto, y realmente lo consiguió, el viaje fue rodado.

Nuestro guía y conductor fue Onx, una persona maravillosa, excelente conductor y un guía magnífico, con un gran conocimiento del país, de la fauna y con un increíble ojo para el avistamiento de animales. Gracias a él pudimos vivir experiencias únicas. No lo olvidaremos nunca y algún día nos volveremos a encontrar✨. 

Botswana nos ha impresionado muchísimo: es un país precioso y su gente es amable, cercana y encantadora. Un país que nos ha robado el corazón y que visitaremos de nuevo. 

Queremos dar las gracias a Steffi, a Gondwana, a Onx y a todas las personas que hicieron posible que nuestro viaje fuera tan especial, maravilloso e inolvidable. Sin duda, deseamos volver a viajar con Gondwana en el futuro. Con ganas de organizar el siguiente juntos!

———————

We are a family of three (a father and two daughters) who have just returned from an unforgettable trip to Botswana. Simply spectacular! We are still emotionally overwhelmed and our minds are still there 💔 
To be honest, we didn’t really know where to start when organizing the trip, and after reading several reviews, we contacted Gondwana Tours & Safaris. It was one of the best decisions of the whole journey. Thanks to the excellent reviews we read on different platforms and forums, we decided to contact Gondwana — and it was absolutely the right choice. Highly recommended!

Steffi organized a completely personalized 10-day tour for us, adapted to our tastes and needs. From the very first moment she was always attentive to making sure everything went perfectly — and she truly succeeded. The trip ran smoothly and exceeded all our expectations. 
Our guide and driver was Onx — a wonderful person, an excellent driver and a fantastic guide, with great knowledge of the country and its wildlife, and an incredible eye for spotting animals. Thanks to him we were able to live truly unique experiences. We will never forget him and we hope to meet again one day.

Botswana has deeply impressed us: it is a beautiful country and its people are kind, warm and charming. A country that has stolen our hearts and that we will definitely visit again. 
We would like to thank Steffi, Gondwana, Onx and everyone who made our trip so special, wonderful and unforgettable. Without a doubt, we would love to travel with Gondwana again in the future. We are already looking forward to organizing our next trip together!

ownerResponse.text:
Queridos Luis, Mireia y Joana:

Muchas gracias por vuestra encantadora reseña y por confiarnos vuestros planes de viaje. Siempre es maravilloso saber que nuestros huéspedes han disfrutado de una experiencia especial en el safari y han conectado de verdad con África.
Ha sido una experiencia muy personal planificar este viaje junto a vosotros y nos encantaría volver a saber de vosotros y veros pronto de nuevo en África.
Muchas gracias de parte de todo el equipo y de mí misma, Steffi.

title: Amazing organization
text: Our safari to Botswana was something we will forever remember. Christelle from Gondwana organized a great vacation - We had a very nice and enjoyable time at the Khwai Guesthouse. The staff were incredible and the food was particularly exquisite. Bruce the Manager was so kind and professional. The guides were exceptional and we got to see many animals. Always punctual, kind and professional. The whole experience was magical and we can only recommend Gondwana to organize. Christelle was also very diligent and answered all of our questions. Botswana is a truly amazing country, which will remain close to our hearts. We hope to come back.

On behalf of Christelle and the whole Gondwana Team, many thanks for travelling with us and the time to review us. Thanks for entrusting us with your travel plans. We love to hear from you again. 
Kind regards, Gondwana Tours & Safaris team

title: Good lodges... TA communication issues
text:
Vic falls: the lodge they put me in was nice but is further away from Vic falls than most hotels. What this means is that you will get picked up first and dropped off last for group activities. This was about 45 mins for me one night to finish picking up all the other guests before the activity even started.

Botswana: Kwando is a first-rate safari and hotel operator and I highly recommend all 3 properties that I stayed at (Chobe, nxai pan, mma Dinare). The issue isn’t the property but ultimately, I didn't love the itinerary.

While I was told that it would be hot in December and recommended permanent tents, (note to others) it almost felt dangerously so. I was sick and dizzy from the heat and had to skip most of the activities to rest. Some lodges have AC but most don’t.

Also, communicating with the TA was average at best. Emails were defensive and at a certain point, I felt like I was being blamed for issues on the trip. Not exactly the relationship I want with a TA and I stopped communicating because it was unpleasant to do so. 

Communication was also disparate and not the easiest to follow. Your final itinerary will be in one online digital itinerary but certain important information will be in another file buried deep in the emails sent and sent just once.

ownerResponse.text:
Dear Justine

many thanks for reviewing us and your valued feedback.
We are glad to hear that you liked the camps we suggested to you in Botswana for your safari, but are sorry to hear that you didn't love the itinerary we planned for you. Perhaps you could give us more details on this, so we can take this into consideration for the future?

Planning a safari, especially one like yours with multiple countries involved, is always complicated and involves a lot of logistics and many details. We exchanged many emails with you over many months and our quotes and suggestions were accompanied by a comprehensive digital itinerary. These digital itineraries cover many important travel related issues like weather to be expected whilst traveling, camps & their facilities, regions visiting, luggage restrictions on light aircraft's and much more.

We try and highlight as many important facts of a safari to a particular region as possible to our guests (each country has different regulations and regulations), but still rely on them to read and familiarize themselves with the specifics of their trip. This avoids issues on the ground upon arrival and whilst traveling!

We were in constant contact with you during your trip (even after hours and during the weekend), tackled the problem of your oversized suitcase at our expense and other issues. We tried to guide you as best as possible in terms of your expectation for particular animal sightings, but also made it clear that we simply can’t guarantee anything or predict nature.

We are sorry to hear that you had a very long transfer to an activity whilst being at Victoria Falls. We will flag this with our transfer company on the ground. However, transfers are usually done on shared bases (unless private transfers are booked and paid for) and unfortunately sometimes involve stops along the way to collect or drop off other guests. We try to minimize stops and unnecessary delays, but sometimes its beyond our control. Thanks for bringing this to our attention.

Once again for your feedback and for traveling with us. We value it very much.

Regards from the whole Gondwana team

title: A well-planned and very wonderful trip
text:
We relied on Gondwana Tours & Safaris to organise a journey that had been on our wish list for years. Christelle supported us from the very beginning, helping us choose not only the right lodges but also the best season for the type of experience we wanted. She was patient while we compared different options and adjusted the itinerary more than once, always keeping an eye on both quality and budget.
The trip itself was organised smoothly: transfers were on time, the logistics worked without stress, and the lodges selected were exactly what we were looking for. We also appreciated the consistently high level of food in all the places we stayed — a pleasant surprise.
Overall, it was a well-structured and rewarding journey. We came back with great memories and would confidently recommend Gondwana Tours & Safaris, and Christelle in particular, to travellers planning a trip to Botswana.

title: Exciting and fulfilling time in Botswana
text: My adult daughter and I recently returned from a tour of Botswana wildlife arranged by Gondwana Tours.  It was excellent from beginning to end.  Well, not necessarily the 15-hour flight from Newark to Johannesburg, even though it was very smooth and on-time.  The Gondwana-arranged flights from Joburg into Maun, to the Camp Sites, and from Kasane back to Joburg, were all comfortable and reasonably short.  The three sites we visited were Mma Dinare, Shinde Footsteps and Bakwena.  All were excellent as the guides and staff were experienced, knowledgeable, helpful and pleasant.  The safari rides, boat or canoe rides and walks were well-planned and the animals sure showed up: elephants in the thousands (particularly in Chobe-Bakwena), lions, cheetahs, leopards, Cape Buffalo, hippos, a few crocs, and thousands of grazers (impala and zebra being most common).  At night we saw a mother hyena and her cub at Shinde.  The food and drink were very good at all three sites and they tried very hard to accommodate my vegetarian daughter.  The accommodations were certainly at the "glamping" level; nice beds, hot showers, potable water plus tea and coffee and even snacks in the tents!  I highly recommend Botswana for a tour and Gondwana to arrange everything.

Thanks for traveling with us and we love to hear from you again.
Steffi and the whole Gondwana Tours & Safaris team

title: Great travel agency- highly recommend
text:
From the moment I contacted Gondwana Tours, our agent, Christelle, was engaged and informative. She went above and beyond to build our dream safari experience, and she was always available to answer any follow up questions. This trip was a ladies' trip to celebrate my daughter's 18th birthday and high school graduation, and she had the best time.

My group wanted a more adventurous and challenging experience- less luxury and more rustic camping- and Christelle was able to provide us with options that suited our desires.

We just returned from our time in Botswana, Zimbabwe, and Zambia, and it was an experience that we shall never forget. I fell in love with the cultures.  Our guides and transfers were all excellent, and we felt that our time and safety was prioritized.

I will be booking another tour with this company in the future as they really do care about tailoring your experience so that you get what you want out of it. Highly recommend.

title: Amazing Perfect days and nights in Botswana
text: This safari trip, greatly enhanced by the wisdom and guidance of Christelle at Gondwana, was fantastic. Actually beyond words. We went to Victoria Falls, and then spent eight luxurious days in Botswana. Three camps, two wonderful lodges and animals galore. The guides chosen for us made the difference. My family of five got to see elephants, lions, hippos, leopards, and so many others up close and within ten feet. Every night we had a great 3 course dinner prepared by talented chefs. At the end of the day at two camps we were pleased and surprised to be treated to great sunsets the wild with appetizers, wine, other drinks and champagne. We were lined up with friends and family in deck chairs listening to music and awaiting the sky to open up into a cosmic panorama. Thanks all and Christelle.

title: Okavango Delta, Lagoon Camp and 4 Rivers Camp
text:
A big thank you to Gondwana Tours & Safaris especially Mark for organising our recent trip to the Okavango delta.

The camps he chose were superb, location, accommodation, food and staff all fantastic.

The guides and trackers were amazing, managing to achieve what seemed like the impossible every day.  Extremely knowledgeable and highly skilled individuals.

The information provided by Mark was comprehensive, the attention to detail was impressive.  He managed to answer all our questions before we asked them.  The instructions about our arrival at Maun were clear and easy to follow.

In camp we were asked by a staff member, who was our agent?  Their response to our reply and we quote 'our star agent you chose well'. 

A memorable, well organised trip in a beautiful unique location.

text:

I highly recommend Gondwana Tours & Safaris to anyone planning a trip to Africa.

title: Wow an experience of a lifetime can't recommend highly enough, thank you Mark and  Gondwana Tours
text:

If it's something you have been thinking about do not put it off, contact Mark @ Gondwana you will not be disappointed.

Thanks again
Lisa & Graham

title: Safari Serenity
text:
I had the most incredible experience on my first visit to Botswana, thanks to Gondwana Tours & Safaris. My 8-night, 9-day trip was perfectly organized and exceeded all my expectations. As a solo traveler, I felt completely safe and well cared for throughout.

The lodges—Bakwena Lodge, Mma Dinare Camp, and Splash Camp—were breathtakingly beautiful, with excellent service and warm hospitality. The safaris offered stunning views of Botswana’s diverse wildlife, from majestic elephants to graceful antelopes and a plethora of bird species.

A special thank-you to Mark, who meticulously planned my itinerary and made fantastic recommendations to ensure the trip was memorable. From smooth transfers to engaging activities like river cruises and game drives, everything was seamless.

Botswana is truly a gem, and Gondwana Tours & Safaris made it an unforgettable experience. Highly recommend their services to anyone planning to explore this magical destination.

title: 5 Star Holiday Organised by 5 Star Gondwana Tours & Safaris
text: We cannot thank Mark Hathaway enough for organising our tailor made holiday to Victoria Falls and Botswana.  3 couples travelling from Perth Western Australia who had the time of their lives! We have travelled together many times to many places and all agreed this was our best holiday ever!  Mark gave us fantastic advice regarding where to go, when to go and what camps to stay at and built our 7 night tailor made itinerary.  His communication was excellent and his knowledge and recommendations were fantastic. The whole trip was seamless with fabulous ground staff, transfers, friendly drivers, flights as per scheduled and assistance from airport staff at Kasane and Maun airport so helpful.  All staff at our accommodation were wonderful, friendly and couldn't do enough for us to make our holiday memorable.  We stayed 2 nights Pioneers Lodge Victoria Falls, 2 nights Bakwena Lodge Kuzungula near Chobe Park and 3 nights at Splash Camp, Kwara Convession, Okavango Delta (The Enclave - absolute highlight). The animals we saw on safari were mind blowing for Australians!  I highly recommend Gondwana Tours & Safaris and THANK YOU Mark for an unforgettable experience and memorable holiday.  Karenne & Terry

title: An unforgettable experience in a beautiful country.
text:
In one sentence, excellent service and perfect arrangements.
 5/5
This was a 10 nights safari tour starting off from the legendary Victoria Falls Hotel in Zimbabwe, then went on to three different locations in Botswana. I have been on many safaris before and I can truly say this was an absolutely memorable trip. My contact with the company was with Ms Christelle Huet who has made absolutely marvellous arrangements for us, and very quick responses to any of my questions.
I stayed at the Chobe Botswana Lodge, the Lagoon in Kwando Private Reserve and the 4 Rivers in Okavango Delta, all located in beautiful environments with special characteristics. Excellent service and amenities in all the three lodges, with friendly cheerful staff. I wish to mention also the excellent guides and trackers we had in all three locations. It was incredible the trackers were able to track the wildlife even in tall grass terrains, and we were able to practically see all the wildlife that we wished to see and up close.
Indeed it was a really memorable trip and I highly recommend Gondwana Tours & Safaris to all.

title: What a terrific tour company!
text:
For many people, including me, a safari trip is a once in a lifetime experience.  This makes selecting a company to arrange a safari a particular type of quandary – the stakes are high, since you don’t want this one opportunity to go sour through a less than optimal tour company, and there are not many people who have used multiple companies, so there is a dearth of reliable comparison information.

That’s the situation I was in about 18 months ago, once my wife and I decided to embark on safari planning.  I looked around at various data sources and reached out to a few companies.  From the responses, I took a deep breath and selected Gondwana Safari and tours.

And what a great decision it was.  Mark Hathaway and the folks at Gondwanda were there with me throughout the planning process, suggesting a good order to the stays (which was perfect, BTW), finding the right camps to stay at, as well as a great hotel in Victoria Falls.  Mark was a terrific source of information, including the best time to go (again, seemed to be perfect timing), what to pack and take, what to tip and what not to bring, as well as providing materials that let us understand the places we were going to.

He even went above and beyond – way above and beyond – to get a personal item I left behind in Victoria Falls returned to me as I boarded my flight to Harare.  Pretty amazing.

Oh, and the safari?  My wife and I travel a lot, and I travelled even more before I met her.  We both agreed – this was the best vacation we had ever taken.  It truly changed our way of understanding the world we live in.

As I said, I have not used other safari companies, so I can’t say if other companies are as good as Gondwana.  But I really can’t imagine that any other company would be any better.

ownerResponse.text:
Many thanks for taking the time to review us and writing such a great review! 
We are very happy to hear that you had a great trip and Mark was part of making your safari a success. It is certainly essential to work with a good ground operator who knows the destination well. 
Thanks for travelling with us - Mark & the whole Gondwana Tours & Safaris team

title: Incredible Safari Experience in Botswana
text:
A safari had been on our bucket list for many years, but we really didn’t know where to start. We contacted Gondwana Tours based on their reviews, and we weren’t disappointed.

We worked with Christelle who was fantastic. We gave her a budget and short list requirements and she came up with several options. We ended up visiting two camps in Botswana, Shinde on the Okavango Delta and Ngoma in Chobe and finished with two nights at the beautiful Victoria Falls Hotel.

Christelle managed to give us two very different safari experiences. Shinde was more remote and a traditional camp. The accommodation was amazing and a special mention to our guide, Kenny. Ngoma was in a slightly busier area, but the sheer number of animals along the Chobe River was just remarkable.

Everything went to plan and the people in Botswana were wonderful. Nothing was too hard. We would happily recommend Gondwana to anyone.

title: Fantastic safari!  Wonderful travel consultant!  Excellent operator!
text: To celebrate my 50th, my husband, ten-year old daughter, and I traveled to Botswana and Zimbabwe.  Having traveled extensively in N. America and abroad, it was by far the best planned vacation of our lives.  It was no question to work with Gondwana Tours & Safaris after our initial contact with Christelle, who listened to our wants and needs and planned a trip that was absolutely perfect!  Christelle was reliable, creative, and diligent in the months of our planning and continued to be responsive, friendly, and concerned to ensure everything went smoothly.  We enjoyed a diverse selection of accommodations from rustic to luxury and remote to urban and excellent cuisine.  We viewed amazing wildlife, engaged in genuine cultural experiences, and supported both conservation and humanitarian causes; all thanks to Christelle and her excellent planning skills, organization, and advice.  We will be using Gondwana and requesting Christelle when we plan our next African vacation because we definitely plan on returning!
